issues.description: Effect is missing the conditional structure. The card has two distinct actions: (1) FlipLife 1 card, and (2) AddDon from deck if Leader has {Big Mom Pirates} type. Current DSL only includes the FlipLife action and omits the conditional AddDon action entirely.
Missing condition check for 'LeaderHasType' with {Big Mom Pirates}. The second effect is conditional on the Leader having this type.
Missing second action. After FlipLife, there should be an AddDon action (count: 1, from deck, set as active) that is conditional on the Leader type check.
